positive: An ethereal, symmetrical forest scene featuring bioluminescent flora and geometric crystalline structures. A central grouping of stylized mythical woodland creatures (e.g., glowing fox, owl) interacting with glowing vines and patterned leaves. The style should be a highly detailed fusion of intricate linework, Art Nouveau symmetry, and celestial pointillism. Strong contrast between deep indigo night sky/shadows and vivid neon aqua, emerald green, and gold glowing accents. The composition must be centrally focused, suitable for repeating or singular placement on fabric, with clean, bold silhouettes and clear edges. Cinematic, high resolution, flat graphic design principles, perfect for screen printing or embroidery.
